memory_text: Nguoi da nhap mon va chap nhan gioi luat.
Nguoi dot pha truoc mat dong mon.
Nguoi moi vao mon phai can duoc dan dat.
Nguoi thang mot tran lam dong mon phan chan.
Nguoi biet dung le vat de mo duong.
Hoa tam cua nguoi da duoc thu thach.
Nguoi tang le vat dung luc.
Nguoi chien thang khien yeu toc phai de mat.
